name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets face costly, time-consuming video localization workflows that require recreating graphics and text elements from scratch. Visual Translate automates the translation of on-screen text while preserving the original visual design. This removes the bottleneck of manual redesign for every target language.
useCases: Translate product demo videos for international markets without redesigning slides or lower thirds
Localize marketing campaign videos across multiple languages at scale
Adapt e-learning course content with translated on-screen text for global learners
Repurpose social media video ads with localized text overlays for regional audiences
